## Description
Briefly describe your changes here.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New skill (adds a new prompt/skill to the pack)
- [ ] Enhancement (improves an existing skill)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code/prompt
- [ ] I have commented my YAML frontmatter
